title: Magnificently Creamy Malaysian Chicken Curry
description: A fresh and creamy Malaysian dish featuring shoyu-koji and flambe, cooked in a donabe, this recipe is gluten-free-friendly and full of energizing flavors.
instructions: Heat the ghee in the donabe over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the shoyu-koji and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Use a kitchen torch to flambe the curry, if desired.
Season the curry with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
